headline: 4 core Solana program addresses and supporting infrastructure catalogued for Jupiter Lend; governance and admin structures require on-chain verification

findings.text: No block-explorer name-tag search feasible on Solana (Solana is a program-addressed blockchain, not contract-addressed); identified 4 core program addresses from dev documentation and integration guides

No dedicated 'Deployed Contracts' page found; protocol website (jup.ag) requires JavaScript and does not expose deployment addresses in static HTML; addresses discovered from SDK integration documentation
Audit report located in jup-ag/docs repository (lend-ottersec.pdf) but PDF fetch blocked; audit existence confirmed via GitHub metadata

GitHub repository (jup-ag/jupiter-lend) contains integration guides and SDK documentation referencing two core program IDs in code examples; no Foundry broadcast artifacts or hardhat-deploy manifests found in fetched navigation
Protocol deployed exclusively on Solana mainnet per charter; single-chain deployment confirmed
No factory enumeration required; Jupiter Lend is a single unified market for all lending/borrowing (not a factory pattern generating child vaults)

Program addresses classified: jup3YeL8... as 'lending' program, jupeiUmn... as 'liquidity' program, JUP6LkbZ... as 'swap router', JUPyiwrY... as 'governance token'; admin addresses and governance structure not yet determined
4 addresses traced to fetched developer documentation and SDK code; all entries anchored to dev.jup.ag SDK pages and GitHub integration guides

rationale.verdict: Discovered 4 core Solana program addresses via developer documentation (SDK guides, CPI references, and integration examples); single-chain protocol on Solana with no multi-chain deployment. Program addresses and token identity confirmed but governance/admin account structures and upgradeability status require on-chain state reading (not conducted this slice). Audit report exists but PDF content not accessible; governance token identified but holder distribution and voting mechanisms not yet verified.

evidence.shows: Jupiter Lend SDK documentation listing program IDs jup3YeL8QhtSx1e253b2FDvsMNC87fDrgQZivbrndc9 (lending) and jupeiUmn818Jg1ekPURTpr4mFo29p46vygyykFJ3wZC (liquidity) in code examples and setup sections

CPI documentation for Jupiter Lend confirming LENDING_PROGRAM = jup3YeL8QhtSx1e253b2FDvsMNC87fDrgQZivbrndc9 and LIQUIDITY_PROGRAM = jupeiUmn818Jg1ekPURTpr4mFo29p46vygyykFJ3wZC; vault-style deposit/withdraw mechanism with fToken shares
Bitquery documentation identifying Jupiter swap program JUP6LkbZbjS1jKKwapdHNy74zcZ3tLUZoi5QNyVTaV4 monitoring sharedAccountsRoute instructions
Jupiter governance token JUP at address JUPyiwrYJFskUPiHa7hkeR8VUtAeFoSYbKedZNsDvCN; token holders participate in DAO voting and earn Active Staking Rewards
Official Jupiter Lend repository with integration guides for Earn (SDK, CPI) and Borrow (SDK, CPI) modules; TypeScript/Rust codebase; 30 commits on main branch as of last fetch
Audit report by OtterSec for Jupiter Lend exists in official docs repository; PDF file size 1.03 MB; full content not accessible via fetch
Jupiter Lend public interface describing 'most advanced money market on Solana' with yield earning; requires JavaScript for full rendering
Jupiter GitHub organization with 183 repositories; jupiter-lend repository updated Jan 30, 2026; multiple product modules (Spot, Perps, Lend, Prediction Markets)

unknowns: D2: No canonical deployed_contracts_doc URL found; addresses extracted from integration SDK rather than deployment manifest
D3: Audit PDF content not accessible (PDF fetch blocked); scope, findings, and recommendations unknown
D7: Admin addresses and governance structure not discovered; on-chain authority accounts and multisig membership require state reading
D7: Upgradeability status (immutable vs. upgradeable vs. mixed) not determined; requires ABI inspection and proxy pattern analysis
D8-offchain: Program addresses discovered via off-chain documentation only; on-chain verification of program deployment, initialization, and current state not performed in this slice

protocol_metadata.about: Jupiter Lend is a permissionless peer-to-peer lending and borrowing protocol on Solana. Users deposit supported tokens to earn yield or borrow against collateral, utilizing fToken receipt tokens for the deposit vault system. The protocol integrates with Jupiter's liquidity layer and emphasizes low liquidation penalties and dynamic risk isolation.
